hooks.command: cd /Users/pallab/Project/AustralianCitizenPro-2 && if git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet; then exit 0; fi && FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // "file"' 2>/dev/null) && MSG="auto: update ${FILE##*/}" && git add -A && git commit -m "$MSG" -m "Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>" && git push origin main 2>/dev/null || true
